description: Sale of a wife's outfit (probably after her death without child, or only bearing a son; the husband sold but had to answer claims; e.g., if they had no child at all, 1/2 of the outfit had to be returned to the wife's family). First page in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE), second page in another hand. The second part had been found and sold later, since the same items are listed first as missing. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכירת ציוד אישי של אישה (כנראה לאחר מותה ללא ילדים); עמוד ראשון בכתב יד חלפון בן מנשה; עמוד שני בכתב יד אחר
